data.summary: 3-Year Anniversary Special Page Reveal – Celebration Event Notice The "Hifumi's Peroro 1-Day Class"
data.body:
3-Year Anniversary Special Page Reveal – Celebration Event Notice

The "Hifumi's Peroro 1-Day Class" event is going on in the 3-Year Anniversary Special Page!
Try decorating your very own special Peroro!🎨

➡️Event Notice: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2659207
